title: RNA Extraction from Pichia pastoris
author: Igem Dusseldorf
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8hght3w

steps.title: pipeting hole culture of Pichia liquid culture into 1
steps.instruction: pipeting hole culture of Pichia liquid culture into 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes

steps.title: centrifugation for 1 min at 10
steps.instruction: centrifugation for 1 min at 10.000 x g

steps.title: extract RNA with Kit
steps.instruction: extract RNA with Kit: for e.g. ZymoResearch YeaStar RNA Kit (Cat.#R1002) following the manufacturers manual.

steps.title: messure the concentration a A260/280 ratio of ~2
steps.instruction: messure the concentration a A260/280 ratio of ~2.0 indicates pure RNA

steps.title: To remove DNA contamination, treated samples...
steps.instruction: To remove DNA contamination, treated samples with DNase use also a Clean and Concentrator Kit for e.g. the Zymoclean RNA Clean & Concentrator Kit (Cat.# R1013).
